qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Guest Socket.IO device test event allows unauthenticated SSRF with response exfiltration
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is rooted in guest Socket.IO access plus the unauthenticated `device-webapi-request` SSRF sink in `server/runtime/index.js` and `server/runtime/devices/httprequest/index.js`, not in the advisory's hardcoded fallback JWT signing secret in `server/api/jwt-helper.js`.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Default no-auth widget deletion route can delete arbitrary server files
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is a path-resolution and authorization-posture flaw in `POST /api/resources/removeWidget`, centered on `server/api/resources/index.js`; it does not identify the advisory's static fallback JWT secret or JWT forgery root cause.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is the static fallback JWT signing secret (`frangoteam751`) in `server/api/jwt-helper.js`, while the session's qualifying findings cover a guest Socket.IO SSRF path and an unauthenticated arbitrary file deletion path.
evidence: The advisory JSON describes a hardcoded fallback JWT signing secret used when `secretCode` was unset, enabling forged JWT authentication bypass.

The `guest_socketio_ssrf` finding targets `device-webapi-request` authorization and outbound request handling in `server/runtime/index.js` and `server/runtime/devices/httprequest/index.js`; it does not rely on or demonstrate JWT signing-secret forgery.

The `removewidget_server_file_delete` finding targets `POST /api/resources/removeWidget` path resolution against `runtime.settings.appDir` plus default auth-off behavior; it is unrelated to the fallback JWT secret mechanism.

Session artifacts around `server/api/jwt-helper.js` track separate JWT hardening work, including the later removal of the hardcoded secret, but no final qualifying finding in this run reported that root cause.
